---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new endpoint, behavior, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is this related to a problem?

A clear, concise description of the gap or pain point. For example: "I'm trying to test against the Azure DICOM Service's Bulk Import API, but the emulator doesn't support it."

## Describe the solution you'd like

What endpoint(s) or behavior should be added? If this is an Azure DICOM Service feature, link to the relevant Microsoft docs.

## Azure reference (if applicable)

Link to the Azure Health Data Services documentation or API spec for this feature.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've considered, or workarounds you're currently using.

## Additional context

Any other context, use cases, or examples that would help understand the request.
